title: MappingTaskCreateRequest
description: Request body for creating a new mapping task.

name.description: The name for the new mapping task.

description.description: A description of the mapping task.

mappingId.description: The ID of the mapping to execute.

runtimeEnvironmentId.description: The runtime environment to use for execution.

scheduleId.description: The schedule to associate with the task.

preProcessingCmd.description: The command to run before the task.

postProcessingCmd.description: The command to run after the task.
